description: Context for GKG code indexing events (gkg_indexing_completed for code data). One context per dispatch, carrying the per-run resource cost of indexing a project at a branch.

project_id.description: ID of the project being indexed.

namespace_id.description: Namespace the project belongs to (leaf of the traversal path). Null when the traversal path cannot be resolved.

root_namespace_id.description: Top-level group of the project's namespace. Null when the traversal path cannot be resolved. Required for billing rollup and enterprise segmentation.

branch.description: Git branch that was indexed. Null when the branch could not be resolved.

commit_sha.description: HEAD commit SHA at the time of indexing. Null when not provided by the dispatch.

indexing_mode.description: Whether the run was a full index or an incremental update on top of a prior checkpoint.

dispatch_id.description: Correlates this event with the dispatch that triggered it.

campaign_id.description: Correlates a group of re-index dispatches (e.g. a namespace backfill). Null for routine push-driven dispatches.

files_discovered.description: Files discovered in the repository archive before parsing.

files_parsed.description: Files successfully parsed (discovered minus skipped and faulted).

files_skipped.description: Files skipped (oversize, minified, unsupported language, etc.).

bytes_discovered.description: Total source bytes discovered in the repository archive. Proxy for repository size; denominator for bytes/sec throughput.

directories_indexed.description: Directory nodes written to the graph.

definitions_indexed.description: Definition nodes (functions, classes, etc.) written to the graph.

imported_symbols_indexed.description: Imported-symbol nodes written to the graph.

written_rows.description: Total rows written to the graph (all node and edge tables) for this dispatch.

written_bytes.description: Approximate bytes written to the graph: the in-memory Arrow buffer size of written batches (the ClickHouse insert path exposes no wire-size summary). Use for relative trends, not exact storage cost.

duration_ms.description: End-to-end indexing duration for this dispatch, in milliseconds. Denominator for derived throughput metrics (files/sec, entities/sec, bytes/sec).
